github.paper_time_tree_note: Latest public commit before the immutable v1 submission timestamp 2026-03-09T05:32:42Z; commit timestamp 2026-03-09T05:01:08Z. The 63-entry archive contains the runner/grader but no dataset, benchmark outputs, judgments, result tables, analysis corpus, or tech-report PDF. Its loader expects one JSON object per file and scans *SQL_Item_*.json, so it cannot directly consume the later official five-array dataset release.
github.timing_note: The acquisition revision is post-v1 release evidence. Its grading prompt, parser, and default configuration are byte-identical to the paper-time commit, but its orchestrator adds JSON-array support and broadens file discovery. It must not be treated as the exact manuscript-time execution tree.

huggingface.timing_note: The official dataset was created after the v1 submission timestamp and its pinned current revision postdates v1 by roughly two days. It contains all 400 current task/rubric rows but no reference answers, source/citation manifest, expert-time/wage rows, model outputs, grader verdicts, or result tables. It is later release evidence, not a verified paper-time result corpus.

audit_scope: Read the complete 39-page immutable paper and all 400 released task/rubric rows; inspected the complete paper-time and acquisition GitHub archive inventories and the runner's grading prompt, parser, configuration, orchestration, search, retry, and reporting interfaces. No paid model execution was performed and no paper result could be replayed because outputs and judgments are absent.
